ddls:
CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the zone */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the zone */,
  "zone_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the zone can hold */,
  "zone_status" TEXT /* Current status of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "manager_department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "manager_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager's supervisor */,
  "manager_join_date" TEXT /* Date the manager joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hire_data" (
  "hire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hire record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "week" TEXT /* Day of the week the data was collected */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day the data was collected */,
  "predict_hire_count" INTEGER /* Predicted number of bike hires */,
  "temp" INTEGER /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "actual_hire_count" INTEGER /* Actual number of bike hires */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike hired */,
  "ride_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the bike ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hire_data_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "hire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hire record the weather data is associated with */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of data collection */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity at the time of data collection */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of data collection */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of data collection */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of data collection */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the time of data collection */,
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition_id") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("weather_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_hire_id FOREIGN KEY ("hire_id") REFERENCES hire_data ("hire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "special_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of special event */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees for the event */,
  "event_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the event is taking place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_special_events_event_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, operations manager, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the company */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the platform was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "model_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_model_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "weather_condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_types" (
  "bike_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike type */,
  "bike_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
